mapper.insert: insert into EMPLOYEE_INFO (USER_ID, DEPT_CD, JBGR_CD, EMPL_STAT_CD) values (#{userId}, #{deptCd}, #{jbgrCd}, #{emplStatCd})
mapper.select: SELECT ei.*, m.USER_NAME AS user_name, d.DEPT_NM AS dept_nm, jg.JBGR_NM AS jbgr_nm, jg.SORT_ORD AS sort_ord FROM EMPLOYEE_INFO ei JOIN MEMBER m ON ei.USER_ID = m.USER_ID JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD JOIN JOB_GRADE jg ON ei.JBGR_CD = jg.JBGR_CD WHERE ei.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT ei.user_id, m.user_name, ei.dept_cd, d.dept_nm, ei.jbgr_cd, jg.jbgr_nm, jg.sort_ord, ei.MNT_USER_ID AS mnt_user_id FROM EMPLOYEE_INFO ei JOIN MEMBER m ON ei.user_id = m.user_id JOIN JOB_GRADE jg ON ei.jbgr_cd = jg.jbgr_cd JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.dept_cd = d.dept_cd WHERE ei.empl_stat_cd = '01' AND ei.user_id != #{userId} AND m.user_role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' ORDER BY d.dept_nm, jg.sort_ord

select ei.user_id, ei.dept_cd, ei.jbgr_cd, ei.empl_stat_cd, jg.jbgr_nm
from EMPLOYEE_INFO ei inner join job_grade jg on ei.jbgr_cd = jg.jbgr_cd where ei.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} and jg.sort_ord = 1
